title: Hyperdimension Neptunia Re;Birth2: Sisters Generation / 超次次元ゲイム ネプテューヌRe;Birth2 / 超次次元遊戲 戰機少女 重生2
Hyperdimension Neptunia Re;Birth2: Sisters Generation / 超次次元ゲイム ネプテューヌRe;Birth2 / 超次次元遊戲 戰機少女 重生2

notes:
Still works perfectly even with neptools based modding such as doing a retranslation patch for the game: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=542831125 . After extracting the contents of the retranslation zip, I did a dll override with dinput 8 in protons winecfg in /steamapps/compatdata/351710/pfx . The pfx is the default proton prefix for this game, no 32bit prefix required. Use the default 64bit prefix by proton. 

To enable this, I used in terminal: $ protontricks --gui. Then i selected a library game which had the id 351710 and it says Hyperdimension Neptunia Re;birth 2. Afterwards I select the Default wineprefix and press run winecfg. Then go to libraries and type dinput8 , and add as an existing dll override. Make sure it says native, built in. Then close winecfg and winetricks and press play in steam. 
You should now be able to run a retranslation patch for this game and any Neptools based mods. Game runs perfectly on its own but I used retranslation patch to make the English Localisation better and more accurate. 

This also works with Neptunia Re;birth 3 with its own retranslation patch. You should know it working when the title screen shows it saying retranslation and a different font. 
You could do this in winetricks as well but Protontricks was simpler for me. or search winecfg in that prefix  /pfx using your preferred file manager and run it from there and do your dll override.
